questions.question: Explain the Big Data Analysis Framework, highlighting its three main components. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Big Data Analysis Framework consists of Data Ingestion, Data Storage and Data Processing

questions.question: Describe the difference between descriptive statistics and inferential statistics in the context of data analysis. Provide one example of each. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Descriptive statistics provides summary statistics of data, e.g. mean, median, mode. Inferential statistics makes conclusions about a population based on sample data, e.g. hypothesis testing

questions.question: Choose a suitable statistical measure to analyze the distribution of a dataset. Explain why you chose that measure. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the nature of the data and the research question. Histograms, box plots, skewness, kurtosis, and Pearson correlation coefficient are some common measures
